channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Appeals court denies Trump's request to halt removal of his name from the Kennedy Center
item.description: The D.C. circuit appeals court rejected all of President Trump's arguments to stop the removal of his name from the Washington arts institution.

item.title: Supreme Court financial disclosures reveal how their books add to their income
item.description: The Supreme Court's annual financial reports provide insights into justices' gifts, travel, and personal finances.

item.title: New U.S. passports featuring Trump's image are now available. Here's how to get or avoid one
item.description: The passports display an image of President Trump and are available only by appointment at the Washington Passport Agency.

item.title: Iran tensions add new uncertainty to fragile global economy
item.description: Crude oil prices rose and stocks fell after President Trump ended the ceasefire with Iran, adding fresh uncertainty.
